item.name: Sea Alpaca
item.description:
A peculiar wavekin that faintly resembles an alpaca. Thankfully, it does not share its landbound counterpart's penchant for spitting.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: These wavekin favor the briniest waters, inhabiting inland lakes that were once contiguous with the ocean. Naturalists saw fit to name them for the Pelupelu's popular pack animal─though they are nowhere near as fuzzy as their mammalian counterparts.
